title: Now Hiring Production Engineer at Kansai Nerolac International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Production Engineer at Kansai Nerolac International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Production Engineer with drive and ambition, Kansai Nerolac International Enterprises in Agra is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Kansai Nerolac International Enterprises:
Kansai Nerolac International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in APQP

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kansai Nerolac International Enterprises!
